heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 93–205, § 1487 Stat. 903Dec. 28, 1973
label: 668aa to 668cc–6 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 93–205, § 1487 Stat. 903Dec. 28, 1973
notes: The provisions of sections 668aa to 668cc–6, which, pursuant to , , , were known as the “Endangered Species Conservation Act of 1969”, are covered by section 1531 et seq. of this title.section 12(d) of Pub. L. 91–13583 Stat. 283Dec. 5, 1969

Section 668aa, , , ; , (e), , , 283, set out the Congressional findings, declaration of policy, and statement of purposes in seeking the protection of endangered species of fish and wildlife.Pub. L. 89–669, § 180 Stat. 926Pub. L. 91–135, § 12(a)83 Stat. 282Oct. 15, 1966Dec. 5, 1969

Section 668bb, , , ; , (c), , , set out the powers and duties of the Secretary of the Interior in carrying out the mandate of the Endangered Species Conservation Act of 1969.Pub. L. 89–669, § 280 Stat. 926Pub. L. 91–135, § 12(b)83 Stat. 282Oct. 15, 1966Dec. 5, 1969
Section 668cc, , , , covered the Secretary’s duty to cooperate with the States, area administration, management agreements, and disposition of revenues.Pub. L. 89–669, § 380 Stat. 927Oct. 15, 1966
Section 668cc–1, , , , defined “Secretary”, “fish or wildlife”, “United States”, and “person”.Pub. L. 91–135, § 183 Stat. 275Dec. 5, 1969

Section 668cc–2, , , , covered importation of endangered species and set out civil and criminal penalties by reference to provisions of .Pub. L. 91–135, § 283 Stat. 275section 668cc–4 of this titleDec. 5, 1969

Section 668cc–3, , , , provided for determination by the Secretary of the species threatened with extinction, methods to be used and factors determinative of Secretary’s determination, and rule making procedures to be used.Pub. L. 91–135, § 383 Stat. 275Dec. 5, 1969
Section 668cc–4, , , , set out penalties for violation of sections 668cc–2 and 668cc–3 of this title and provisions for their enforcement.Pub. L. 91–135, § 483 Stat. 276Dec. 5, 1969
Section 668cc–5, , , , covered international agreements for fish and wildlife preservation.Pub. L. 91–135, § 583 Stat. 278Dec. 5, 1969

Section 668cc–6, , , , called for coordination of administration of provisions relating to endangered species of fish and wildlife with animal quarantine and tariff laws, and provided for non-impairment of functions of Secretaries of Agriculture and Treasury under agriculture and tariff laws, including imports.Pub. L. 91–135, § 683 Stat. 278Dec. 5, 1969
